note: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 from both WebFetch and curl (x-deny-reason: host_not_allowed) — consistent with CDN/network proxy blocking the sandbox IP. Even example.com returns 403, confirming this is an agent-environment network restriction, NOT site downtime. SSL handshakes via openssl s_client succeeded for all 8 domains, confirming servers are live. SSL WARNING: certs now show notAfter=Jun 8 12:07:xx 2026 GMT (29 days remaining, below 30-day threshold). Yesterday showed Jun 7; today Jun 8 — one-day forward creep suggests Vercel Let's Encrypt auto-renewal is in progress. Expect a larger jump to ~90-day expiry once renewal completes. This SSL warning is genuine; monitor daily.
